title: Trident of Fish Command

markdown:
# Trident of Fish Command

- **Type**: M|XPHB
- **Weight**: 4 lb.
- **Damage**: 1d8 P
- **Properties**: T|XPHB, V|XPHB

This magic weapon has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While you carry it, you can expend 1 charge to cast [[dominate_beast Beast]] (save DC 15) from it on a Beast that has a [[swim_speed Speed]].
